Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar Oct-04-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Vicki Gross.
Wendy Moseley, Esq. for Petitioner: Linda Lippstreu, present as Guardian ad litem for: Kristen Lippstreu, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $1,250.00
Medical Expenses $1,103.04
Costs $440.54
A net balance of $2,206.42 to be deposited into a blocked account with Union Bank of California, 830 College Ave., Kentfield, CA. 94904, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Written Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-22-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Fabio, Foti, Esq., appearing Defendant & moving party: AAA Freight Systems, Willie Davis
Mark Murray, Esq., for plaintiff & opposing party: Linda Lippstreu

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Parties appeared on 5/22/07. Motion Of Defendants/Cross-Complainants AAA Freight Systems and Willie James Davis To Compel Written Discovery is granted as Plaintiff is ordered to respond on or before May 22, 2007. The electronic service was not effective service. Defendants'/Cross-Complainants' request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
